name: Case Study Example
history: History of self-critical tendencies. Used to maintaining control and achieving goals. Current challenges involve job seeking, personal relationships, and family dynamics.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must be perfect to be accepted.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I make a mistake, it means I am a failure.
coping_strategies: Avoids confrontation and self-criticism by deflecting blame and avoiding responsibility.
situation: Experiencing difficulties with job searching. Dealing with ongoing relationship and family conflicts involving a person named Ivan.
auto_thought: I can't do anything right; everyone is against me.
behavior: Becomes defensive and avoids addressing issues directly.
